content_of_post_to_comment: Sometimes when you have a traumatic past you have days where you truly believe that life will always be painful. Then the fog clears and you see the light again. I had one of these days - okay - maybe two or three this last week. Today the fog has cleared and I can see clearly again. What I see is an adventure, a life worth living, a colourful existence. If you are having a bad day, hang in there and be oh so kind to yourself. Some days our past feels heavier than other days.
